title: Cuneiform Tablet #0182: Achaemenid Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
